prompt:
Goal: editorial illustration for a programming textbook
Scene: A vertical flowchart decision tree. At the top, an input box labeled "value: unknown" feeds into the first diamond node: "typeof === 'string'?" with Yes/No branches. The Yes branch leads to a green box "handle string". The No branch leads to another diamond: "typeof === 'number'?" with Yes leading to an orange "handle number" box and No leading to a third diamond: "typeof === 'boolean'?" and so on. Each resolved branch shows the narrowed type in its box. The tree has clean connecting arrows and each level is color-coded. A small legend shows typeof return values.
Style: Head First book illustration style, clean lines, slightly whimsical and humorous, warm colors, educational
Aspect ratio: 16:9
Background: white
Text in image: minimal or none
Avoid: photorealistic, dark, scary, complex UI screenshots
